name: Acadia National Park
description: Acadia National Park protects the natural beauty of the highest rocky headlands along the Atlantic coastline of the United States.

name: Arches National Park
description: Arches National Park contains the world's greatest density of natural stone arches. The park has over 2,000 catalogued arches.

name: Grand Canyon National Park
description: Grand Canyon National Park encompasses 277 miles of the Colorado River and adjacent uplands. One of the most spectacular examples of erosion anywhere

name: Yellowstone National Park
description: Yellowstone National Park is the world's first national park, known for its geothermal features and diverse wildlife including grizzly bears and wolve

name: Yosemite National Park
description: Yosemite National Park is best known for its waterfalls, but within its nearly 1,200 square miles, you can find deep valleys, grand meadows, ancient

name: Zion National Park
description: Zion National Park is a southwest Utah nature preserve distinguished by Zion Canyon's steep red cliffs. The Virgin River runs through the canyon.

name: Rocky Mountain National Park
description: Rocky Mountain National Park is a US national park in Colorado. The park encompasses 415 square miles of diverse mountain ecosystems.

name: Glacier National Park
description: Glacier National Park is a national park in Montana. The park spans more than 1 million acres and includes parts of two mountain ranges.
